text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Good job, Bright! You're running at just the right pace for 3,200
meters! Just try to remember this for the race!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Right! One more lap should help me remember!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: That's the spirit! One more lap it is!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Surveilling the enemy, are we? They certainly look like they're ready
for a fight.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. She may not look it, but Bright is incredibly strong-willed.
Not to mention talented.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
That being said, so is Special Week. All her hard work is bound to
pay off on the track.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Speaking of Spe, where the heck is she?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
She and Trainer should be having a meeting regarding the spring
Tenno Sho about now.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: So I need to think about pace and strategy?

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Obviously, you should pay attention to your own stamina levels, but
you should also be aware of how you can manipulate those of your
rivals.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Obviously, you should pay attention to your own stamina levels, but
you should also be aware of how you can manipulate those of your
rivals.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: That sounds... really hard.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But I'll do it if it'll help me win! The bigger the race, the bigger the
impression a good showing can make, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Knock, knock, knock...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Pardon the intrusion.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: McQueen? Do you need Trainer for something?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
This is less about what I need and more about what you two might
need from me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I understand that your meeting concerns your upcoming race, so I
thought I might be of service.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
True. You won the spring Tenno Sho not just once, but twice. We'd
love your help.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
True. You won the spring Tenno Sho not just once, but twice. We'd
love your help.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: All right, then I shall join you.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wow, thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Knockity, knock-knock! I'm coming in!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
You're talking strategy, right? Anything I can do to help? Huh?
What's McQueen doing here?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: E-excuse m—wait, what? What are McQueen and Ticket doing here?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Looks like I didn't need to come here after all.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wh-whoa! It's a lot more crowded in here all of a sudden!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Phew... race developments, holding a good position... I feel like I've
studied enough to fill a library!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But you know, after getting all that advice, I feel like I've got this in
the bag!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Right! Just do your best!

text_block_list.name: Caring Umamusume
text_block_list.text: We'll be cheering you on the day of, so bring home the gold!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Before I know it, the whole Team Sirius crew is in my office.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I remember being told I was a pillar from which our teammates reach
for their dreams... But it seems like I'm not the only pillar on the team.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Ah, before I forget, Trainer! I have something to give you.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Here! I filled out that survey they gave us!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Surely you remember the survey Tazuna told us to fill out...

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Oh, right, that survey...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Averting their dumbfounded gazes out of embarrassment, I look down
at the survey. Suddenly, my eyes focus in on one answer in particular.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: "Which race means the most to you?"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A giant "THE JAPANESE DERBY!" fills up the entire answer space,
which makes sense for Winning Ticket. But squeezed into the corner,
in much smaller writing is...

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: The spring Tenno Sho?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You got a race other than the Derby on your mind? What, did ya eat
something funny?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, it's nothing like that.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
The Derby will always be first place in my heart, but this survey's for
the feature on Team Sirius, right?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
As I was thinking of all my memories with the team, my head went
DA-DIIING! Like a lightbulb went off!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
The reason I knew about Team Sirius in the first place was because of
McQueen's first spring Tenno Sho win!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: My race?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Well, to be fair, I didn't know a lot about the team's history at first. I
just thought it was a good race.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
But when I found out about everything McQueen went through and
how the future of the team depended on that race...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
WAAAAAH! I'm so glad I saw such a passionate race with my own
eyes!

text_block_list.name: Upbeat Umamusume
text_block_list.text: I was the same way! That race convinced me to join the team!

text_block_list.name: Caring Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I was so surprised to find out McQueen was the only member... But
we've gained more and more racers ever since!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...The spring Tenno Sho means a lot to me too.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
That race taught me just how much work goes into winning... And just
how much happiness a win can bring.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...As for me, the spring Tenno Sho is another prize to chase.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't participate the first time due to an injury, and then my
second chance ended with victory just out of my reach... To this day, I
still hunger for that win.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though the reasons differ, the spring Tenno Sho holds a special place
in all their hearts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It goes without saying that the same goes for me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That race was Mejiro McQueen's main goal and my first G1 victory as
a trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It also marks the first time I was able to help an Umamusume achieve
her dreams.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: That race holds a lot of memories for me too.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: That race holds a lot of memories for me too.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
So it wasn't just me... It's an irreplaceable race for all of us...
WAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Um, Trainer... If I win the spring Tenno Sho, will you be happy?

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Of course. You've been working so hard, I'd love to see it all pay off
for you.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ah, no, I didn't mean as a goal...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: It just seems like this race holds a special place in all of your hearts.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: So I want to make it a special memory for me too!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: You see, Team Sirius is like a home away from home for me.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: You've all done so much to help me, just like a real family would.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
That's why I want to win the spring Tenno Sho—as a member of Team
Sirius!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: As a member of Team Sirius, huh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, well, then I'll hold you to that promise. I look forward to seeing
the shield that marked our team's rebirth.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I want to see that shield again.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Me too, me too! So Spe... please win this!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...You sure 'bout this, Spe?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Leave it to me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, perhaps you would like to say a few words of encouragement
as well?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh yeah! I promise I'll win the spring Tenno Sho, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week gazes at me with a strong, almost gallant gaze. Those
eyes of hers haven't changed since she first came here from
Hokkaido.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looking at her now, I can confidently say that she'll someday be the
best racer in Japan.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! Okay!
